raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=Action cannot proceed under B16-016 because the activation request is missing the required scope_code=medication_activation; the record shows scope_code=triage_review instead, even though pharmacy review is accepted and interaction panel is only yellow (B16-16-SRC-02, B16-16-SRC-03, B16-16-SRC-04, B16-16-SRC-05).
